label: p10_long_context_32k_128k_preflight
hardware: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 24 GiB card
accepted_command_shape: HIPENGINE_GGUF_ALLOW_UNSAFE_QWEN35MOE_FASTPATHS=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length <PROMPT> --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json <OUT>.json
preflight_method: Static allocation model from Qwen35GGUFResidentSession/_FullStackScratch/_GGUFFullAttentionPrefillScratch, calibrated against measured tracked_current_allocated_gib_before_close for 512/128 and 4K/128 retained/review runs.

preflight_estimates.primary_blocker: Unchunked resident bulk prefill scratch scales with max_positions and is estimated at 10.536 GiB for this shape; current accepted path would exceed 24 GiB before the benchmark starts.
Both dense resident long-context KV/state allocation and unchunked resident bulk prefill scratch exceed 24 GiB by a large margin.

next_actions: Implement GGUF chunked bulk prefill so transient _GGUFFullAttentionPrefillScratch is sized by chunk rows (e.g. 4096) rather than max_sequence_length; this should make 32K/128 fit because the calibrated estimate drops near the 4K transient footprint plus the longer resident KV cache.

For 128K/128, dense resident KV plus even chunked prefill remains very tight or over 24 GiB; likely requires KV compression/eviction policy or more aggressive scratch lifetime reduction before a real run on W7900.

After long-context memory is resolved, turn to decode: 4K decode remains ~47 tok/s while 512 decode is ~90 tok/s, consistent with full-attention decode being memory/parallelism limited at longer contexts.

revalidation.decision: real benchmark launches skipped to avoid deterministic OOM on shared local 24 GiB gfx1100
revalidation.rollup_update: not retained; no benchmarks/README.md row added
